podcasts.name: Davie Fogarty
podcasts.title: This invention made $250K… then stalled
podcasts.transcript: This plastic invention has done quarter of a million dollars in sales, but growth has completely stopped. >> I'm not going to lie that it's a bit soul destroying to know that we're just going backwards. >> What's terrifying is the founder has invested so much money in the business. >> We're about $300,000 in. >> My biggest monks are my biggest losses. >> But lucky, I have a plan. I think I can grow this business with AI. >> It feels weird to do it any other way. >> I know. I know it's uncomfortable, but that's why it's going to work. Have you heard of um Snacket before? >> I own a Snacket. >> So, I've been doing nothing but editing for the past few days. Sales are improving since we chatted in February, which is good. really got to rescue this
